2603.10397.title: On the Learning Dynamics of Two-layer Linear Networks with Label Noise SGD
2603.10397.paper_summary: One crucial factor behind the success of deep learning lies in the implicit bias induced by noise inherent in gradient-based training algorithms. Motivated by empirical observations that training with noisy labels improves model generalization, we delve into the underlying mechanisms behind stochastic gradient descent (SGD) with label noise. Focusing on a two-layer over-parameterized linear network, we analyze the learning dynamics of label noise SGD, unveiling a two-phase learning behavior. In \emph{Phase I}, the magnitudes of model weights progressively diminish, and the model escapes the lazy regime; enters the rich regime. In \emph{Phase II}, the alignment between model weights and the ground-truth interpolator increases, and the model eventually converges. Our analysis highlights the critical role of label noise in driving the transition from the lazy to the rich regime and minimally explains its empirical success. Furthermore, we extend these insights to Sharpness-Aware Minimization (SAM), showing that the principles governing label noise SGD also apply to broader optimization algorithms. Extensive experiments, conducted under both synthetic and real-world setups, strongly support our theory. Our code is released at https://github.com/a-usually/Label-Noise-SGD.
2603.10397.paper_summary_zh: 一個關鍵因素使深度學習成功的原因在於梯度基礎訓練算法中固有噪聲所引發的隱性偏差。受到經驗觀察的啟發，訓練時使用帶有噪聲的標籤能改善模型的泛化能力，我們深入探討帶有標籤噪聲的隨機梯度下降（SGD）背後的基本機制。專注於一個兩層的過度參數化線性網絡，我們分析了標籤噪聲SGD的學習動態，揭示了兩階段的學習行為。在\emph{第一階段}，模型權重的大小逐漸減小，模型擺脫了懶惰狀態；進入了豐富狀態。在\emph{第二階段}，模型權重與真實插值器之間的對齊度增加，模型最終收斂。我們的分析突顯了標籤噪聲在驅動從懶惰狀態到豐富狀態轉變中的關鍵角色，並最小程度地解釋了其經驗成功。此外，我們將這些洞見擴展到尖銳性感知最小化（SAM），顯示標籤噪聲SGD所遵循的原則也適用於更廣泛的優化算法。在合成和現實世界設置下進行的廣泛實驗強烈支持我們的理論。我們的代碼已發布於 https://github.com/a-usually/Label-Noise-SGD。
2603.10397.author: Tongcheng Zhang et.al.
2603.10397.authors: Tongcheng Zhang, Zhanpeng Zhou, Mingze Wang, Andi Han, Wei Huang, Taiji Suzuki, Junchi Yan
